edges.quote: his sister Rhaena
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Jaehaerys I Targaryen SIBLING_OF Rhaena Targaryen

edges.quote: My brother Aegon died at the hands of our uncle
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Jaehaerys I Targaryen SIBLING_OF Aegon

edges.quote: His wife, my sister Rhaena
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rhaena Targaryen SPOUSE_OF Aegon

edges.quote: died at the hands of our uncle
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Maegor I Targaryen UNCLE_OF Aegon

edges.quote: After the death of her daughter Aerea
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rhaena Targaryen PARENT_OF Aerea Targaryen

edges.quote: her remaining daughter, Rhaella, a septa
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rhaena Targaryen PARENT_OF Rhaella Targaryen

edges.quote: his brother's tomb
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Walton Stark SIBLING_OF Alaric Stark

edges.quote: the Lord Commander of the Night’s Watch, Lothor Burley
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lothor Burley COMMANDS Night's Watch

edges.quote: the First Ranger Benton Glover
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Benton Glover MEMBER_OF Night's Watch

edges.quote: Ser Lucamore Strong of his Kingsguard
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lucamore Strong MEMBER_OF Kingsguard

edges.quote: two Kingsguard knights, Lorence Roxton and Lucamore Strong
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lorence Roxton MEMBER_OF Kingsguard

edges.quote: Jaehaerys would act as an intermediary between them
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Jaehaerys I Targaryen NEGOTIATES_WITH Prince of Pentos

edges.quote: taking ship for Braavos to consult with the Sealord
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Barth NEGOTIATES_WITH Sealord of Braavos

edges.quote: died at the hands of our uncle in the Battle Beneath the Gods Eye
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Maegor I Targaryen KILLS Aegon

edges.quote: reportedly smote Balerion on the snout
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Baelon Targaryen ATTACKS Balerion

edges.quote: he was lied to, cheated, and humiliated
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Sealord of Braavos DECEIVES Barth

edges.quote: we are told, in time Rhaena and Maegor Towers came to forge a friendship
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rhaena Targaryen COMPANION_OF Maegor Towers

edges.quote: still worshipped the Seven and kept the traditions of knighthood
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Theomore Manderly WORSHIPS the Seven

edges.quote: continued to ride Dreamfyre until the end
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rhaena Targaryen BONDED_TO Dreamfyre

edges.quote: Princess Aerea’s escape on Balerion
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aerea Targaryen BONDED_TO Balerion

edges.quote: the princess had already died and been burned
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Aerea Targaryen VICTIM_IN Death of Aerea Targaryen

edges.quote: Rhaena Targaryen died in 73 AC, at fifty years of age
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Rhaena Targaryen VICTIM_IN Death of Rhaena Targaryen

edges.quote: the Battle Beneath the Gods Eye
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Aegon VICTIM_IN Battle Beneath the Gods Eye

edges.quote: the gods blessed them with another son. Baelon, he was named
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Baelon Targaryen PARTICIPATES_IN Birth of Baelon Targaryen

edges.quote: the Iron Bank of Braavos forgave the entire remaining principal
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Sealord of Braavos PARTICIPATES_IN Barth's mission to Braavos

edges.quote: they sacrificed their prince to their queer gods
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Prince of Pentos VICTIM_IN Sacrifice of the Prince of Pentos

edges.quote: visit the men of the Night's Watch at Castle Black
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Alysanne Targaryen AGENT_IN Alysanne's visit to Castle Black

edges.quote: the size of the Gift was doubled with a stroke
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Night's Watch PARTICIPATES_IN Doubling of the Gift (New Gift)

edges.quote: Manderly also staged a small tourney in the queen’s honor
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Theomore Manderly AGENT_IN Tourney at White Harbor

edges.quote: a tourney at King’s Landing on the anniversary of the king's coronation
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Jaehaerys I Targaryen AGENT_IN Tenth-anniversary tourney at King's Landing
